column1: Best conditions on the Asheville porch: July and August, low humidity weeks, afternoon sun warms the porch
Worst conditions: any rainy stretch in June. Bundles can mold if not moved inside.
Nettle must be dried on a screen (do not bundle), and use gloves to handle until fully dry.
Chamomile dries best on a flat screen, not bundled. Prevents mold in the center of the flower head.
Peppermint and lemon balm dry well bundled. Stems together, leaves facing down, hung from the beam hooks.
Good dryness test: the herb crumbles easily when rubbed between fingers. No give or moisture.
Sow chamomile seeds indoors in late January or February so plants are ready after last frost
Try passionflower as a climbing vine on the fence, harvest and dry in October or November 2026
Get at least one early foraging run for nettle before the season peaks (Hominy Creek, late winter)
Consider a second lemon balm division to expand the bed slightly
